description.zh: 图像生成的基础大模型
description.en: Foundation models for image generation

description.zh: 图像生成控制模型
description.en: Image control models

description.zh: 图像放大和增强模型
description.en: Image upscaling and enhancement models

description.zh: 风格、艺术与人像 LoRA
description.en: Style, art, and portrait LoRAs

description.zh: 深度估计等辅助模型
description.en: Auxiliary models such as depth estimation

description.zh: 视频生成模型
description.en: Video generation models

description.zh: 文生音乐与音频生成模型
description.en: Text-to-music and audio generation models

description.zh: 文本大语言模型
description.en: Text large language models

description.zh: 视觉语言模型
description.en: Vision-language models

description.zh: 通义千问 3 4B 思考版，强化链式推理；4-bit 量化约 2.5GB。
description.en: Qwen3 4B Thinking with extended reasoning; ~2.5GB at 4-bit.

description.zh: 通义千问 3 视觉语言模型，支持图文理解；4-bit 量化约 3GB。
description.en: Qwen3 vision-language model for image-text understanding; ~3GB at 4-bit.

description.zh: FLUX.1 蒸馏版，4步快速出图，12B参数。
description.en: FLUX.1 distilled, 4-step fast generation, 12B params.

description.zh: FLUX.1 开发版，28 步高质量出图，12B 参数。
description.en: FLUX.1 dev variant; high quality at 28 steps, 12B parameters.

description.zh: FLUX.1 Krea 合作版，增强真实感，12B 参数。
description.en: FLUX.1 Krea collaboration variant with enhanced realism; 12B parameters.

description.zh: FLUX.2 Klein 4B 蒸馏版，4 步快速出图，质量优秀。
description.en: FLUX.2 Klein 4B distilled variant; fast 4-step generation with strong quality.

description.zh: FLUX.2 Klein 9B 蒸馏版，8 步真实感出图。
description.en: FLUX.2 Klein 9B distilled; realistic 8-step generation.

steps.label: 步数
steps.note: Klein 蒸馏版推荐 4 步；可试 4–15 步以丰富细节

guidance.label: CFG引导
guidance.note: 1.0最真实，1.5-2.0提升提示词遵从，>2.0可能引入伪影

strength.label: 去噪强度
strength.note: 图生图/编辑时控制原图保留程度，越高变化越大

description.zh: FLUX.2 Klein 4B 基础版，50 步高质量，支持训练。
description.en: FLUX.2 Klein 4B base model; high quality at 50 steps and trainable.

description.zh: FLUX.2 Klein 9B 基础版，50 步高质量。
description.en: FLUX.2 Klein 9B base model; high quality at 50 steps.

description.zh: 通义 Z-Image 完整版基础模型，支持 CFG 与负向提示，适合风格探索、LoRA 与二次开发；快速写实人像请用 Z-Image-Turbo。
description.en: Tongyi Z-Image foundation model with CFG and negative prompts; best for style exploration, LoRA, and fine-tuning. Use Z-Image-Turbo for fast photorealistic portraits.

steps.label: 步数
steps.note: 官方推荐28–50步；步数过多未必更锐，人像/快速出图请用 Z-Image-Turbo

guidance.label: CFG引导
guidance.note: 官方推荐3–5；可配合负向提示词

description.zh: 通义 Z-Image-Turbo，6B 单流 DiT，8 步快速高质量出图；支持 LoRA（Turbo 训练需 de-distill 适配器；与 Z-Image Base 训练的适配器互通）。
description.en: Tongyi Z-Image-Turbo — 6B single-stream DiT, 8-step fast generation; LoRA supported (train on Turbo with de-distill adapter; compatible with Z-Image Base adapters).

steps.label: 步数
steps.note: Turbo 蒸馏版推荐 8 步；人像可试 9–12 步

description.zh: Bria FIBO 8B模型，优秀的JSON提示理解，支持生成/编辑/精炼/灵感四种模式。
description.en: FIBO model for human-like image generation.

description.zh: Bria FIBO-Lite 轻量版，8B 参数，支持 JSON 结构化提示。
description.en: Bria FIBO-Lite lightweight 8B model with JSON-structured prompts.

description.zh: Bria FIBO-Edit 图像编辑模型，支持自然语言图像编辑。
description.en: Bria FIBO-Edit image editing with natural-language instructions.

description.zh: Bria FIBO-Edit-RMBG 背景移除模型，输出透明 PNG。
description.en: Bria FIBO-Edit-RMBG background removal; outputs transparent PNG.

description.zh: 通义千问 Qwen-Image-2512（2025-12 升级版），20B MMDiT，更强人像真实感与自然纹理。
description.en: Qwen-Image-2512 (Dec 2025) — 20B MMDiT with improved human realism and textures.

description.zh: 通义千问 Qwen Image Edit 指令编辑，VL 图文理解 + VAE 参考 latent。
description.en: Qwen Image Edit with VL understanding and VAE reference latents.

description.zh: FireRed Image Edit 1.1 指令编辑（仅图生图编辑，不支持文生图），强身份一致性，支持多参考图。
description.en: FireRed Image Edit 1.1 — instruction-based image edit only (no text-to-image); strong identity consistency and multi-reference input.

description.zh: 百度 ERNIE-Image-Turbo 8B 蒸馏版，8 步快速出图，擅长复杂指令与文字渲染。
description.en: Baidu ERNIE-Image-Turbo 8B distilled — 8-step generation with strong instruction following and text rendering.

steps.label: 步数
steps.note: Turbo 蒸馏版推荐 8 步

description.zh: 智谱 CogView4-6B，原生中文文生图与图生图（rewrite），擅长复杂文字渲染与多语言提示。
description.en: Zhipu CogView4-6B text-to-image and reference img2img (rewrite) with native Chinese support and strong text rendering.

strength.label: 去噪强度
strength.note: 图生图/编辑时控制原图保留程度，越高变化越大

description.zh: SeedVR2 3B 超分辨率模型，用于图像放大与增强。
description.en: SeedVR2 3B upscaler for image enlargement and enhancement.

description.zh: SeedVR2 7B 超分辨率模型，更高质量的放大效果。
description.en: SeedVR2 7B upscaler for higher-quality enlargement.

description.zh: Real-ESRGAN x4plus 轻量像素超分（RRDBNet，MLX）。适合快速 2×/4× 放大，显存占用远低于 SeedVR2。
description.en: Real-ESRGAN x4plus lightweight pixel upscaler (RRDBNet, MLX). Fast 2×/4× enlargement with much lower memory than SeedVR2.

description.zh: SeedVR2 7B 视频时空修复，对源视频抽帧后做 3D VAE 超分并重新封装。
description.en: SeedVR2 7B spatiotemporal video restoration (frame extract → SR → remux).

description.zh: SeedVR2 3B 视频时空修复，轻量变体。
description.en: SeedVR2 3B spatiotemporal video restoration (lighter variant).

description.zh: Apple Depth Pro 深度估计模型，生成高质量深度图。
description.en: Apple Depth Pro depth estimation for high-quality depth maps.

description.zh: FLUX.1 Canny 边缘控制，让生成遵循边缘轮廓。
description.en: FLUX.1 Canny edge control for generation guided by edge maps.

description.zh: FLUX.1 Depth 深度控制，让生成遵循空间深度关系。
description.en: FLUX.1 Depth control for generation guided by depth structure.

description.zh: FLUX.1 Fill 局部重绘与图像修复/外扩。
description.en: FLUX.1 Fill for inpainting, retouch, and outpainting.

description.zh: FLUX.1 Redux 图像变体与风格迁移，混合参考图与文本提示。
description.en: FLUX.1 Redux for image variation and style transfer from reference + prompt.

description.zh: Z-Image-Turbo Fun ControlNet Union（Canny / Depth / Pose / HED / MLSD 等），需上传预处理控制图。
description.en: Z-Image-Turbo Fun ControlNet Union (Canny, Depth, Pose, HED, MLSD, …); supply a preprocessed control image.

description.zh: FLUX.1 Kontext 上下文编辑，支持多模态条件生成与编辑。
description.en: FLUX.1 Kontext for multimodal conditioned generation and editing.

description.zh: LiblibAI 去糊/清晰增强 LoRA，适用于 FLUX.1-dev。
description.en: LiblibAI anti-blur/sharpness LoRA for FLUX.1-dev.

description.zh: InstantX 吉卜力动画风格 LoRA，适用于 FLUX.1-dev。
description.en: InstantX Ghibli-style LoRA for FLUX.1-dev.

description.zh: InstantX 新海诚画风 LoRA，适用于 FLUX.1-dev。
description.en: InstantX Makoto Shinkai–style LoRA for FLUX.1-dev.

description.zh: 官方 Canny 控制 LoRA，需配合边缘/Canny 条件流程。
description.en: Official Canny control LoRA; use with edge/Canny conditioning.

description.zh: 官方 Depth 控制 LoRA，需配合深度图条件；许可以仓库为准。
description.en: BFL Depth LoRA ; requires depth conditioning; license per upstream.

description.zh: 高写实人像与皮肤质感增强，触发词见上游仓库说明。
description.en: High photorealism and skin-texture boost; see upstream repo for trigger words.

description.zh: Schnell 用 PVC/手办风格 LoRA。
description.en: PVC figure style LoRA for Schnell.

name.zh: FLUX.1 Schnell PVC 手办风 LoRA
name.en: FLUX.1 Schnell PVC Figure Style LoRA

description.zh: Klein AC 风格 LoRA；默认绑定 9B，若作者标明仅 4B 请改 base 或勿混用。
description.en: AC-style LoRA for FLUX.2 Klein; defaults to 9B—verify upstream if 4B-only.

name.zh: FLUX.2 Klein AC 风格 LoRA

description.zh: Klein 4B 精灵表/序列帧向 LoRA。
description.en: Spritesheet-oriented LoRA for Klein 4B.

description.zh: Klein 4B 变焦效果向 LoRA。
description.en: Zoom-effect LoRA for Klein 4B.

description.zh: Klein 4B 画面外扩向 LoRA。
description.en: Outpainting LoRA for Klein 4B.

description.zh: Klein 4B 物体移除向 LoRA。
description.en: Object-removal LoRA for Klein 4B.

name.zh: FLUX.2 Klein 4B 物体移除 LoRA

description.zh: Wan 2.2 T2V Lightning 4 步蒸馏 LoRA（V2.0，高噪与低噪各一份）。需配合原版 T2V FP16 完整版（MLX 与 CUDA 通用）；固定 4 步、无需 CFG。
description.en: Wan 2.2 T2V Lightning 4-step distill LoRA (V2.0, high- and low-noise pair). Requires the original T2V FP16 full bundle (MLX and CUDA); fixed 4 steps, no CFG.

description.zh: Wan 2.2 I2V Lightning 4 步蒸馏 LoRA（V1，高噪与低噪各一份）。需配合原版 I2V FP16 完整版（MLX 与 CUDA 通用）；固定 4 步、无需 CFG。
description.en: Wan 2.2 I2V Lightning 4-step distill LoRA (V1, high- and low-noise pair). Requires the original I2V FP16 full bundle (MLX and CUDA); fixed 4 steps, no CFG.

description.zh: 明星脸/中国高颜值气质人像风格 LoRA，基于通义 Z-Image 训练。
description.en: Celebrity-style Chinese portrait LoRA trained on Tongyi Z-Image.

description.zh: 明星脸/中国高颜值气质人像风格 LoRA，基于通义 Qwen Image 训练；引擎内合并仅 MLX。
description.en: Celebrity-style Chinese portrait LoRA for Qwen Image; in-engine merge is MLX-only.

description.zh: Qwen Image 2512 LightX2V 4 步蒸馏 LoRA（V1.0 BF16）。需配合 qwen-image FP16 完整版；建议 4 步、CFG 1.0。
description.en: Qwen Image 2512 LightX2V 4-step distill LoRA (V1.0 BF16). Requires qwen-image FP16 full weights; use 4 steps and CFG 1.0.

description.zh: Qwen Image Edit 2511 LightX2V 蒸馏 LoRA（4 步或 8 步 BF16）。需配合 qwen-image-edit FP16 完整版；建议 CFG 1.0。
description.en: Qwen Image Edit 2511 LightX2V distill LoRA (4-step or 8-step BF16). Requires qwen-image-edit FP16; use CFG 1.0.

description.zh: Lightricks LTX-2.3 蒸馏版，含音视频 DiT，两阶段 8+3 步快速生成。
description.en: Lightricks LTX-2.3 distilled A/V DiT; two-stage 8+3 step generation.

steps.label: 步数
steps.note: 蒸馏两阶段：Stage1 默认 8 步 + Stage2 固定 3 步；低于 8 会自动补全

description.zh: Lightricks LTX-2.3 开发版，含音视频 DiT，支持 CFG，质量更高。
description.en: Lightricks LTX-2.3 dev A/V DiT; supports CFG for higher quality.

description.zh: HunyuanVideo 1.5 共享编码器（VAE + DiT 配置），供 LightX2V 蒸馏版依赖。
description.en: HunyuanVideo 1.5 shared encoders (VAE + DiT config) for LightX2V distill models.

description.zh: HunyuanVideo 1.5 文生视频 LightX2V 4 步真蒸馏（单文件 DiT，480p）；需先安装共享编码器。
description.en: HunyuanVideo 1.5 T2V LightX2V 4-step true distill (single-file DiT, 480p); requires shared encoders.

description.zh: HunyuanVideo 1.5 超分修复，1080p 超分变体。
description.en: HunyuanVideo 1.5 super-resolution; 1080p SR variant.

description.zh: HunyuanVideo 1.5 图生视频 720p 完整版；需 Qwen2.5-VL + ByT5 与 SigLIP image_encoder。
description.en: HunyuanVideo 1.5 I2V 720p full weights; requires Qwen2.5-VL, ByT5, and SigLIP image_encoder.

description.zh: HunyuanVideo 1.5 图生视频 720p CFG 稀疏蒸馏版（50 步，CFG=1）；需 SigLIP image_encoder。
description.en: HunyuanVideo 1.5 I2V 720p CFG sparse-distilled (50 steps, CFG=1); requires SigLIP image_encoder.

steps.label: 步数
steps.note: CFG 蒸馏版固定 50 步（上游 recipe）

description.zh: Wan 2.2 14B 共享编码器（UMT5 + VAE），供 LightX2V / TurboDiffusion / Bernini 依赖。
description.en: Wan 2.2 14B shared encoders (UMT5 + VAE) for LightX2V, TurboDiffusion, and Bernini models.

description.zh: Wan 2.2 文生视频14B模型，高质量视频生成。
description.en: Wan 2.2 Text-to-Video 14B model, high quality video generation.

description.zh: Wan 2.2 图生视频14B模型。
description.en: Wan 2.2 Image-to-Video 14B model.

description.zh: Wan 2.2 文生视频 14B LightX2V 4 步蒸馏（FP8，仅 CUDA）；需先安装 Wan 2.2 14B 共享编码器。
description.en: Wan 2.2 T2V 14B LightX2V 4-step distill (FP8, CUDA only); requires Wan 2.2 14B shared encoders.

description.zh: Wan 2.2 图生视频 14B LightX2V 720P 4 步蒸馏（2026.04 新版）；MoE 双专家，无需 CFG。
description.en: Wan 2.2 I2V 14B LightX2V 720p 4-step distill (Apr 2026); MoE dual experts, no CFG.

steps.label: 步数
steps.note: LightX2V 4-step distill（固定 4 步：2 高噪 + 2 低噪）

description.zh: Wan 2.2 I2V 14B TurboDiffusion rCM 4 步极速（CUDA）；基于 SageAttention+SLA 加速，无需 CFG。
description.en: Wan 2.2 I2V 14B TurboDiffusion rCM 4-step fast mode (CUDA); SageAttention+SLA accelerated, no CFG.

description.zh: Wan 2.1 T2V 14B TurboDiffusion rCM 4 步极速（CUDA，720p/480p）；无需 CFG。
description.en: Wan 2.1 T2V 14B TurboDiffusion rCM 4-step fast mode (CUDA, 720p/480p); no CFG.

description.zh: Wan 2.1 T2V 1.3B TurboDiffusion rCM 4 步极速（CUDA，480p）；轻量快速文生视频。
description.en: Wan 2.1 T2V 1.3B TurboDiffusion rCM 4-step fast mode (CUDA, 480p); lightweight fast T2V.

description.zh: ByteDance Bernini-R 14B 视频编辑渲染器（基于 Wan）；图生视频/局部编辑/风格迁移，需 Wan 共享编码器。
description.en: ByteDance Bernini-R 14B video edit renderer (Wan-based); animate, local edit, style transfer; requires Wan encoders.

description.zh: ByteDance Bernini-R 1.3B 轻量视频编辑（基于 Wan2.1）；适合风格迁移、字幕/水印去除与局部编辑。
description.en: ByteDance Bernini-R 1.3B lightweight video edit (Wan2.1-based); style transfer, subtitle/watermark removal, local edits.
Wan 2.2 TI2V 5B; default 480×704, 81 frames, 16fps; 720P landscape 1280×704 or portrait 704×1280 (40 steps, CFG 5, shift 5).

width.note: 720P 可选：横屏 1280×704、竖屏 704×1280（与官方一致）；低分辨率会自动对齐 patch/VAE

height.note: 720 会在推理前自动对齐为 704（VAE×patch 步长 32）；官方 720P 横屏请选 1280×704

description.zh: ACE-Step-1.5 XL SFT，4B DiT 解码器，高质量音乐生成。
description.en: ACE-Step-1.5 XL SFT; 4B DiT decoder for high-quality music generation.

description.zh: 默认 auto：对描述+歌词执行 format_sample（官方 Custom 路径）；off 关闭 5Hz LM。
description.en: Default auto runs format_sample on caption+lyrics (official Custom path); off disables 5Hz LM.

description.zh: Super Eurobeat 风格 LoRA（ACE-Step 1.5 XL）；建议在 prompt 中加入触发词 Eurobeats。
description.en: Super Eurobeat style LoRA for ACE-Step 1.5 XL; add trigger word Eurobeats in the prompt.

description.zh: DiffSynth 伴奏增强 LoRA，适用于 ACE-Step 1.5 XL SFT。
description.en: DiffSynth accompaniment enhancement LoRA for ACE-Step 1.5 XL SFT.

description.zh: ACE-Step 官方春节主题 LoRA（1.5 XL），适合喜庆、节日氛围音乐。
description.en: Official ACE-Step Chinese New Year theme LoRA (1.5 XL) for festive holiday music.

description.zh: DiffRhythm 2 — Block Flow Matching 半自回归歌曲生成；MuQ 风格条件 + BigVGAN 解码；48 kHz 输出，最长 210 秒。
description.en: DiffRhythm 2 — semi-autoregressive block flow matching song generation; MuQ style conditioning + BigVGAN decode; 48 kHz output, up to 210s.

description.zh: 适用于 FLUX.1-dev；通用真实感增强 LoRA，提升人物细节与整体写实度。
description.en: General photorealism LoRA for FLUX.1-dev; improves portrait detail and realism.

description.zh: 面向中国人像审美训练的 FLUX.1-dev LoRA；棚拍、时尚与室内外写真，肤质细腻自然。建议权重 0.9–1.0。
description.en: FLUX.1-dev portrait LoRA tuned for Chinese aesthetics; studio, fashion, and outdoor portraits. Weight 0.9–1.0 recommended.

description.zh: AWPortrait CN 升级版；更广的东方美学与全年龄段面谱，场景与民族服饰响应更好。适用于 FLUX.1-dev，建议权重 0.9–1.0。
description.en: Upgraded AWPortrait CN with broader Eastern aesthetics and age coverage; better scenes and ethnic costumes. For FLUX.1-dev; weight 0.9–1.0.

description.zh: 基于 Z-Image 的东方人像美颜 LoRA；降噪、改善光比与面孔多样性。适用于 Z-Image-Turbo（与 Z-Image Base 适配器互通）；建议权重 0.8。
description.en: Z-Image portrait-beauty LoRA: reduced grain, improved lighting, and face diversity. For Z-Image-Turbo (compatible with Z-Image Base adapters). Weight 0.8 recommended.

description.zh: 时尚摄影向 FLUX.1-dev LoRA；构图与肤质更细腻写实，适合人像与服装大片。建议权重 0.9。
description.en: Fashion-photography FLUX.1-dev LoRA with finer composition and realistic skin. Weight 0.9 recommended.

description.zh: FLUX.1-dev 真实质感增强 LoRA；自然肤质与细节，无固定触发词，建议权重 1.0（可为负向微调）。
description.en: FLUX.1-dev realism/detail LoRA for natural skin; no trigger words. Weight 1.0 recommended (can go negative).

description.zh: FLUX.1-dev 亚洲女性写实肖像 LoRA；触发词 1girl，建议权重 0.6–1.0。
description.en: FLUX.1-dev realistic Asian female portrait LoRA. Trigger: 1girl. Weight 0.6–1.0.

description.zh: FLUX.2 Klein 9B 亚洲青年写实人像 LoRA；动漫/插画转真人或文生图均可。触发词如 realistic style of a young Asian girl，建议权重 0.6–1.0。
description.en: FLUX.2 Klein 9B Asian photoreal portrait LoRA for T2I or anime-to-real. Trigger e.g. realistic style of a young Asian girl. Weight 0.6–1.0.

description.zh: StarFace 中国高颜值气质人像 LoRA，绑定 Z-Image-Turbo 快速出图；建议权重 0.6–0.8。
description.en: StarFace Chinese portrait LoRA for Z-Image-Turbo fast generation. Weight 0.6–0.8 recommended.
